content.en:
Who wouldn't want the price tag of the Tree Heart Liquid is not high, and the effect is very good, and the side effects are low?

Therefore, even if they have exchanged all their contribution points, they will have to exchange them for these Tree Heart Liquid.

If you slow down the exchange, you won't be able to exchange anything.

......

"So many Tree Heart Magic Liquid have been exchanged in a blink of an eye~ in a blink of an eye!"

Ye Tian could only continue to make the Tree Heart Magic Liquid, but with just one Tree Heart Demon Seed, he couldn't make a large amount of Tree Heart Magic Liquid in a short period of time, so he could only take his time.

However, with so much Tree Heart Demonic Liquid, there would definitely be an Eternal Dao Realm that would raise the cultivation to the Eternal Dao Body Consummation Realm.

"It's time to put the Endless Solidification Technique in the Terran Temple, whoever cultivates to reach the perfection of the Eternal Dao Body and the Eternal Dao Seed is raised to a certain level, can cultivate the Endless Solidification Technique!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Thereupon.

He placed the Endless Solidification Technique in the Terran Temple, and set a very high price.

Before you know it, another long time has passed.

this day.

Lin Lei, the Eternal Dao Realm of the Human Race, successfully used the Tree Heart Demon Seed to complete the breakthrough of the Eternal Dao Body, and successfully raised the Eternal Dao Body to the consummation realm.

After that, Lin Lei only needed to raise the Eternal Dao Seed to a certain level, and then he could choose to solidify the Eternal Dao Seed and impact the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm.

It is very difficult to improve the Eternal Dao species, ordinary resources are useless, even if it is the Terran Temple, there are not several such resources, and it is necessary to rely on Lin Lei to collect them himself, which requires luck.

......

Lone Star Realm Alliance.

Ye Tian was browsing a document.

This document records the relationship between the Eternal Kingdom Alliance and the Demon Seed Abyss, which is top-secret information, and he paid a lot of money to get it.

According to this information, once the number of Eternal Realms exceeds a hundred, it will be a large Eternal Realm Alliance, which will give birth to more than ten Demon Seed Abysses, and will attract Demon Seeds from the Eternal Realm God Realm, but not too much.

For example, if the number of Eternal Realms reaches more than two hundred, the Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seed attracted is slightly more.

For example, there are more than 300 Eternal Realms in the Lone Star Realm Alliance, and the number of Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seeds attracted is too large, which requires a lot of Eternal Realm God Realm suppression, which is also the reason why those Eternal Realm God Realms do not leave.

If they all come, those Lone Star Realm Alliances will collapse soon.

In that case, it would only be possible for a group of lords to sacrifice their own Eternal Realms and choose to destroy the Eternal Decree and reduce the number of Eternal Kingdoms.

And the number of Eternal Kingdoms has reached more than 1,000, and that is the super-large Eternal Kingdom.

There are very large Eternal Realms in the Eternal Realm, but there seem to be only a few of them, and they are very far away.

The super-large Eternal Realm has attracted too many Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seeds, and without that kind of top-notch Eternal Realm God Realm, it can't be suppressed at all.

And there is also a piece of information on this, that is, the more eternal kingdoms there are, the more and more precious resources will be born.

For example, a super-large Eternal Realm will give birth to a lot of resources that will be helpful to the Eternal Realm God Realm, while a small Eternal Realm Alliance will never be born.

In short, the more Eternal Kingdoms there are in the Eternal Kingdom Alliance, the more benefits there are, but the disadvantages are also greater, so there are many threats to face.

"Threat!"

Ye Tian pondered for a moment and felt that he could solve these dangers.

"When I cultivate to break through to the Eternal Realm God Realm, I will develop the Endless Realm Alliance into a super-large Eternal Realm Alliance!"

Ye Tian decided.

Of course, he definitely can't do this in a short period of time, otherwise he will definitely attract other Eternal Realm God Realms, and if he attracts many strong people to occupy it, he can't stop it.

Therefore, he must ensure that his strength is strong enough, and the human race is strong enough.

......

this day.

Ye Xingchen came to find Ye Tian.

"Solidify the resources of the Eternal Dao Seed!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

On the side of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance, it is almost impossible to give birth to such a resource, but the Endless Kingdom Alliance has only opened up billions of solstice eras, and such a resource was born.

At this time, he thought of the reason for the large alliance of kingdoms.

The resources born of the large kingdom alliance are naturally not comparable to the small eternal kingdom alliance like the Pantheons Kingdom Alliance, but the danger encountered by the large kingdom alliance is also greater.

"Xingchen, looking for this kind of resource will help you solidify the Eternal Dao Seed. "

Ye Tian said.

"Yes, father!" Ye Xingchen replied.

"Take this treasure yourself!" Ye Tian said.

Ye Xingchen didn't shirk it, he asked for it.

In the years that followed, the Endless Realm Alliance found one resource after another that could help solidify the Eternal Dao Seed, and Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue, and Xiao Yue all allocated and used it to solidify their own Eternal Dao Seed.

Ye Tian didn't ask for it, he had the White Extreme Xuanye and the Xuanlin Ancient Vine, and the speed of the solidification of the Eternal Dao Seed itself was very fast, and these resources could only be accelerated a little bit for him.

So, let's give them to Ye Xingchen.

......

Since solving the problem of the Demon Seed Abyss, Ye Tian would occasionally release one or two Eternal Decrees, allowing people to open up the Eternal Realm and increase the number of Eternal Realms in the Endless Realm Alliance.

The greater the number of Eternal Kingdoms, the more resources are added, the faster the Terrans will develop, and the more top-level resources will be born.

From time to time, some Eternal Dao Realm discovered a great opportunity, and their strength cultivation improved by leaps and bounds.

For example, Lin Lei, he has excellent luck.

According to his cultivation speed, it is estimated that it will not be long before he has the hope of impacting the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm.

Before you know it, another billion solstice years have passed.

this day.

Lin Lei of the human race began to impact the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, he was not ready to continue to improve the Eternal Dao Seed, and directly began to solidify the Eternal Dao Seed.

And he also successfully exchanged the Endless Solidification Technique from the Terran Temple and began to solidify the Eternal Dao Species.

Soon after, he succeeded in solidifying the Eternal Dao Seed and cultivated to break through to the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm.

And after Lin Lei broke through, a few people couldn't help it one after another, and they also began to impact the half-step Eternal Realm God Realm, which made the number of half-step Eternal Realm God Realms of the human race increase rapidly, and it had far surpassed the Ten Thousand Gods Realm Alliance.

And Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed is gradually about to be solidified, once the complete solidification is completed, he can impact the Eternal Realm God Realm into.
